data.title: ElfQuest Shards #1-12 14 16 Near-Complete 14-Issue Lot 1994 Warp Graphics
data.description:
ElfQuest: Shards ran from 1994 to 1996 as WaRP Graphics continued expanding the ElfQuest universe, following the tribe's struggle to reunite after a devastating war. This is a near-complete run of 14 issues — #1 through 12, plus #14 and #16. Only #13 and #15 are missing.

Stored bagged with individual backing boards by a careful collector. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage.

Series | ElfQuest: Shards
Publisher | WaRP Graphics
Issues | #1-12, 14, 16 (14 issues)
Missing | #13 and #15
Year | 1994-1996
Condition | VF, bagged and boarded

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Near-complete run of ElfQuest: Shards (WaRP Graphics, 1994-1996), issues #1-12, 14, and 16. 14 issues total. Missing #13 and #15. All issues individually bagged with backing boards. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage noted.
